india_trends.summary: Sensex opened at 77,257.27 and rose to 77,477.48, up 563.98 points (0.73%) shortly after 9:16 am; Nifty opened at 24,063.55 and increased to 24,177.00, gaining 179.45 points (0.75%)

india_trends.title: Crude oil price steadies amid US-Iran war uncertainty. Where's it headed in near term?
india_trends.summary: US-Iran war: MCX crude oil prices rose marginally amid no peace agreement and continued disruptions to traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. Analysts said the near-term bias is cautious and contingent on headline-driven developments in the Middle East war.

india_trends.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank shares tank 5% after Q4 results. What Morgan Stanley, Nomura, other brokerages are saying
india_trends.summary: Shares of Kotak Mahindra Bank fell despite posting a solid Q4FY26 performance, with net profit rising 13.3% YoY and NII up 8.1%. india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea share price jumps 10% after AGR relief; Should you buy the telecom stock?
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea share price has gained 26% in one month, but the stock has fallen 5% in three months. The telecom stock has gained 15% in six months and has rallied over 53% in one year.

india_trends.title: Gold rate declines on MCX amid persisting inflation worries; US-Iran talks remain in focus
india_trends.summary: Gold price today: Gold rate declined on the MCX in morning deals on Monday, 4 May, amid an uptick in the US dollar and persisting concerns over a spike in inflation due to higher-for-longer crude oil prices.

india_trends.title: Rupee opens 4 paise lower at 94.95 against US dollar
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee opened weaker at 94.95 against the US dollar, influenced by fluctuating oil prices and ongoing U.S.–Iran negotiations. Brent crude prices fell amid U.S. intervention efforts for stranded ships, while the rupee has dropped nearly 2% over the past eight days.

india_trends.title: US Stock Market | Stay Invested or Exit? Market recovery clouds ‘Sell in May’ playbook
india_trends.summary: Wall Street's 'sell in May' advice might be a mistake this year. Despite historical trends, the S&P 500's strong rebound, fueled by easing geopolitical tensions and robust corporate earnings, suggests a different approach. Investors face a dilemma: stick to tradition or capitalize on current mar

india_trends.title: Distributors skirt SIF certification norms as talent shortage bites
india_trends.summary: Unqualified sub-brokers are reportedly selling specialized investment funds, violating regulations as the segment faces a lack of certified sellers. This practice will likely concern Sebi, which will then hold asset management companies accountable, regulatory experts said.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Nifty’s 2 pillars now facing structural headwinds: Ravi Dharamshi's warning on IT & consumption
india_trends.summary: His warning carries weight. ValueQuest has been quietly repositioning for months by moving capital away from consumption-oriented exposures and steering clear of IT services entirely, even before the geopolitical shock that roiled markets over the past two months.

india_trends.title: Bitcoin Tops $80,000 for Three-Month High as Asian Stocks Rise
india_trends.summary: Bitcoin rose above $80,000 for the first time in more than three months as Asian stocks approached record highs.
